	jc jump_1CF7

	inc R1

	orl A, R0

	orl A, R3
	nop
	xrl A, 00h
	mov R1, #00h	;   0
	jmp @A + DPTR

	nop
	jnz fwd_1D4E_jump_1B00

	xrl A, 00h
